overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a desert highway leading to Night City. The camera moves slowly along the roadside as various futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt, with the massive city skyline visible in the distance against a clear dawn sky.

events.description: first futuristic vehicle enters frame from the distance driving toward the city
black sedan passes close to camera on the wet asphalt

agents.ego_description: moving slowly along the desert roadside observing the passing traffic and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving past camera on the wet road surface
white car approaching from the direction of the city

entered.detail: futuristic metropolis with tall glass skyscrapers and industrial structures visible in the distance against the dawn sky
multi-lane asphalt road with wet reflective surface showing recent rain
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple cables running parallel to the highway
sparse dry bushes and small desert plants along the roadside
distinctive yucca trees scattered across the desert landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway with the futuristic Night City skyline visible in the distant left background. The camera moves slowly along the roadside as various futuristic vehicles begin to pass by on the wet asphalt. Power lines run parallel to the road on the right, while sparse desert vegetation dots the foreground.

events.description: large billboard structure becomes visible on the right side of the highway
convoy of multiple vehicles passes simultaneously including a distinctive green armored truck

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside as the large billboard comes into view on the right

notable_agents.action: green armored truck with yellow accents driving past on the highway
silver sports car overtaking in the left lane heading toward the city

entered.detail: massive rectangular advertisement billboard with support structure visible beside the highway

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, a large billboard structure enters the frame on the right side while traffic density increases. Multiple futuristic vehicles pass by including a distinctive green armored truck. The power lines recede into the distance as the camera moves forward, with the city skyline remaining visible on the left.

events.description: billboard passes out of view behind camera as the industrial complex becomes more prominent
yellow industrial truck passes close to camera heading toward the city

agents.ego_description: moving past the billboard area with the industrial complex now more prominent on the left side

notable_agents.action: yellow industrial truck with black stripes driving past on the wet asphalt
dark sedan approaching from the distance with headlights on

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera moves past the billboard which exits the frame behind. The industrial structures on the left side become more prominent and detailed as the camera approaches. Traffic continues to flow past on the highway, including a distinctive yellow industrial truck, while the city skyline remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert highway that gradually transitions from an open wasteland toward the industrial outskirts of a futuristic metropolis. It begins beside a wide stretch of wet asphalt with the distant Night City skyline visible to the left and sparse desert vegetation in the foreground. As the camera progresses, the traffic density increases and a large billboard structure enters the frame on the right, passing a distinctive green armored truck while the parallel power lines recede into the distance. The scene then shifts as the billboard exits the frame, allowing more prominent and detailed industrial structures to emerge on the left. Finally, the camera continues its forward glide past a yellow industrial truck, with the massive city skyline remaining a constant anchor in the background.
